task.inventory_reason: SCORE is an existing reusable source family with openly available data/code/materials. The cluster contains child data tables, an OSF manifest, and an included preregistration-indicated subset; these should be owned by the broader SCORE parent, with the subset kept as an included derived corpus view.
task.next_action: Inventory orig_outcomes, repli_outcomes, repro_prereg-check, and OSF manifest/meta files under the SCORE parent; preserve the existing score_cos_preregistration_indicated_original_papers subset row and avoid duplicate root creation.
task.preferred_source_family_name: Systematizing Confidence in Open Research and Evidence (SCORE) data/code/materials
